summary: Code quality is solid (Get-PrLabels.ps1 shows strong PowerShell patterns; workflow YAML is well-structured with proper permissions and job deps), but deliverable is INCOMPLETE and cannot pass requirements. CRITICAL: No test files in tests/ directory, no fixture files in fixtures/ (test-harness.ps1 lines 47–174 reference both but they don't exist), no .actrc file. TDD requirement violated—no failing test provided. test-harness assumes `act` and `git` are installed without validation (lines 95–98, would silently fail). Misleading comment line 68: calls $projectFiles a 'Glob-list' but hardcodes paths. Array edge case line 48: $allCases.Count fails with single result in some PS versions; use @() wrapper. Log parsing lines 126–137 assumes act output format never changes (fragile). Regex escape logic line 85 manually lists metacharacters instead of using Regex.Escape().
